title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission "Don't Allow" followed by Find My Device "Cancel" navigates back to Poly Lens Menu (deprecated for iOS)
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During the onboarding flow, when the location permission prompt appears, tap "Don't Allow".
3. Complete the onboarding flow and navigate to the Home screen.
expected: The app navigates back to the previous screen (Poly Lens Menu).
